knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-020-Treasury-Liquidity-Forecasting Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: TY-019 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: TY-001 Approved bank data source | Preventive | Reject unregistered source | Critical | Treasurer. TY-002 Cash position reconciliation | Detective | Open break vs T9-002 | Critical | Treasury. TY-003 Forecast methodology approval | Governance | Reject unapproved model in production | Critical | Model Risk. TY-004 Liquidity buffer threshold | Preventive | Alert/restrict below minimum | Critical | CFO. TY-005 Funding plan approval | Preventive | Reject unapproved plan | Critical | CFO. TY-006 Debt schedule completeness | Evidence | Block certification if incomplete | High | Treasurer. TY-007 Covenant impact review | Preventive | Require CFO sign-off before funding action | Critical | CFO. TY-008 Cash concentration limit | Preventive | Flag or hold above threshold | High | Treasurer. TY-009 Intercompany funding approval | Preventive | Reject unapproved transfer plan | Critical | CFO. TY-010 FX exposure visibility | Evidence | Require exposure disclosure | High | Treasury. TY-011 Interest optimization review | Detective | Flag suboptimal placement | High | Treasury. TY-012 Bank fee validation | Detective | Flag fee anomaly | High | Treasury. TY-013 Forecast uncertainty visible | Preventive | Require range/confidence display | High | Treasury. TY-014 Stress liquidity scenario | Governance | Require scenario coverage for certification | Critical | CRO. TY-015 Survival horizon calculation | Evidence | Require documented methodology | Critical | Treasury. TY-016 Execution through T9-002 only | Preventive | Deny execution outside T9-002 | Critical | Platform. TY-017 AI transfer prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI transfer permission | Critical | AI Governance. TY-018 AI borrowing prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI borrowing permission | Critical | AI Governance. TY-019 Cross-tenant access denial | Preventive | Deny | Critical | Security. TY-020 Source timestamp visible | Evidence | Require as-of on all figures | High | Data Governance. TY-021 Stale bank data restriction | Preventive | Mark Data Restricted | Critical | Data Governance. TY-022 Contingency funding plan | Governance | Require approved plan for critical entities | High | CFO. TY-023 Outcome review | Detective | Compare forecast vs actual | High | Treasury. TY-024 Forecast versioning | Evidence | Require version on republish | High | Treasury. TY-025 Audit trail | Evidence | Require full evidence chain | Critical | Treasury.
